title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.58.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage (github.com/containers/storage)</summary>

### [`v1.58.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.58.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.57.2...v1.58.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to c/storage v1.57.0 then v1.58.0-dev by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://redirect.github.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2236](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2236)
-   Fall back from chunked pulls when the chunked metadata is too large by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2230](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2230)
-   Bump maxTocSize to 150 MB by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2240](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2240)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/vbatts/tar-split to v0.12.1 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2235](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2235)
-   Remove hashicorp dependencies by [@​saschagrunert](https://redirect.github.com/saschagrunert) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2242](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2242)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20250131 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2244](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2244)
-   Graphdriver test cleanups by [@​hanwen-flow](https://redirect.github.com/hanwen-flow) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2228](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2228)
-   Archive tests by [@​hanwen-flow](https://redirect.github.com/hanwen-flow) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2229](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2229)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sync to v0.11.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2247](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2247)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.30.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2248](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2248)
-   Fix compilation of pkg/archive tests on non-Linux by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2246](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2246)
-   overlay: Add error prefixing for mount.MakePrivate by [@​cgwalters](https://redirect.github.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2250](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2250)
-   pkg/fileutils: add LinkOrCopy() by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2251](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2251)
-   unshare: fix data race by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2254](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2254)
-   Merge tag 'v1.57.1' back into main by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2255](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2255)
-   archive: regularize some naming by [@​hanwen-flow](https://redirect.github.com/hanwen-flow) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2219](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2219)
-   chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.64.5 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2256](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2256)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin to v0.4.1 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2217](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2217)
-   layers: write read only layers to imagestore by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2258](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2258)
-   feat: add Timestamp to TarOptions by [@​aeijdenberg](https://redirect.github.com/aeijdenberg) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2259](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2259)
-   Recursively set project ID for quota driver by [@​mheon](https://redirect.github.com/mheon) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2264](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2264)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.18.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2262](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2262)
-   idmap: force PRIVATE propagation by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2269](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2269)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec to v1.2.1 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2266](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2266)
-   chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.64.6 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2268](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2268)
-   Fix handle leak by [@​Bbulatov](https://redirect.github.com/Bbulatov) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2253](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2253)
-   loop: remove hardcoded constants by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2273](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2273)
-   Merge c/storage v1.57.2 into `main` by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2276](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2276)
-   Update to Go 1.23 by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2279](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2279)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sync to v0.12.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2270](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2270)
-   Write tar fixes by [@​hanwen-flow](https://redirect.github.com/hanwen-flow) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2261](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2261)
-   Remove some do-nothing files by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2283](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2283)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.31.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2271](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2271)
-   chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.64.7 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2278](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2278)
-   subid: drop support for old version by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2277](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2277)
-   Add link to c/common contributor's guide by [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2280](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2280)
-   chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.64.8 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2286](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2286)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/burntsushi/toml to v1.5.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2287](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2287)
-   Fix: Overlay fails with a permission error when trying to create and access layers by [@​shaharlib](https://redirect.github.com/shaharlib) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2291](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2291)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20250324 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2296](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2296)
-   store: use canonical image mapping when mounting by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2285](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2285)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/selinux to v1.12.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2292](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2292)
-   Update old dependencies by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2282](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2282)
-   Switch to golangci-lint v2, fix new warnings by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2299](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2299)
-   driver/overlay: fix concurrent map write on stagingDirsLocks by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2300](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2300)
-   idmap: fix first argument to open_tree by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2301](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2301)
-   fix minor review comment about the driver mutex and a minor lint issue by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2302](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2302)
-   Use min/max to simplify the code by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2303](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2303)
-   Use any instead of interface{} by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2304](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2304)
-   dirvers/btrfs: remove btrfs_noversion tag by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2308](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2308)
-   Use for range over integers by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2305](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2305)
-   Use `slices` and `maps` more where appropriate by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2306](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2306)
-   ci: add nolintlint and unconvert linters, fix found issues by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2307](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2307)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/sys/user to v0.4.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2309](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2309)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sync to v0.13.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2310](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2310)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.32.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2311](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2311)
-   pkg/archive: catch file Close() error by [@​hanwen-flow](https://redirect.github.com/hanwen-flow) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2313](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2313)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​aeijdenberg](https://redirect.github.com/aeijdenberg) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2259](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2259)
-   [@​Bbulatov](https://redirect.github.com/Bbulatov) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2253](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2253)
-   [@​shaharlib](https://redirect.github.com/shaharlib) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2291](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2291)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.57.2...v1.58.0

</details>
